sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13755" key="a)posobhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποσοβ-ητέον</orth>, <sense id="n13755.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must shun,</tr_> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l.</abbr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">295</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
